transcription.text: Hey there, folks. It's me, the Extra Crispy Colonel. Now, I love original recipe, but in this sizzling summer heat, I'm feeling a little Extra Crispy. My Extra Crispy $20 fill-up is freshly double-breaded and fried to a luxurious mouth-watering bronze. Extra Crispy isn't just a product, it's a lifestyle. KFC. It's Extra Crispy good.
